title: Reflective Equilibrium: Basic Cycle
description: Walk through a full case-to-principle cycle and recompute coherence.

steps.text: You can divert a trolley to save five at the cost of one life.
Test whether maximizing welfare supports your judgment.
Reflective equilibrium adjusts judgments and principles to improve coherence.

steps.notes: Compute how well your judgment and principle fit.

steps.text: Add the constraint against killing and observe the tension.

steps.prompt: Revise your judgment, principle, or background theory to restore coherence.
